zh.Hessen-Darmstadt, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟-達姆斯塔特

nameMeanings.name: Schaffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for a steward or bailiff, from an agent derivative of Middle High German schaffen ‘to manage’. It is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Denmark, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia; see also 3 below.

South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäffer): variant of Schäfer (see Schaefer ). It is also found in Hungary, Denmark, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia. Compare Cheffer , Schaeffer , Shaeffer , Shafer , Shaffer , and Sheaffer .
Germanized form of Hungarian Sáfár, Slovenian and Croatian Šafar or Šafer, Czech Šafář or Šafer, Slovak Šafár, cognates of 1 above (see Safar ).

variants.name: Safar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Fahim, Ammar, Mazin, Safar, Abdallah, Abdulrahman, Antoun, Fadel, Faisal, Farid, Fereydoun, Haitham.  French Gaston, Antoine.  Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Ignac, Pavel, Zdenka.
Arabic and Jewish (from North Africa): occupational name from Arabic ṣaffār ‘coppersmith, worker in copper or brass’.

Arabic: from the personal name Ṣafar, from ṣafar, the name of the second month of the Islamic calendar. This is sometimes chosen as a personal name for children born in this month. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians.

variants.name: Sheaffer
meanings: Americanized form of German Schäffer (see Schaffer 2).

variants.name: Schaeffer
meanings: German (Schäffer):
see   Schaffer   2.
variant of Schäfer (see Schaefer ).

variants.name: Shaeffer
meanings: Americanized form of German Schäffer (see Schaffer 2).

variants.name: Scheffer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Schäffer (see Schaffer 2). It is also found in Hungary.

variants.name: Schaffner
meanings: German: occupational name for a steward or bailiff, a variant of   Schaffer   1.

variants.name: Shaffer
meanings: Americanized form of German Schäffer (see Schaffer 2), Schaffer 1, or Schäfer (see Schaefer ).

variants.name: Schofer
meanings: German:
variant of Schoffer (see Schaffer ).
(Schöfer): variant of Schäfer (see Schaefer ).

variants.name: Schaefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Hans, Gerhard, Helmut, Dieter, Wolfgang, Hermann, Horst, Manfred.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäfer): occupational name for a shepherd, from an agent derivative of German Schaf, Middle High German schāf ‘sheep’. It is also found in Hungary and Czechia. Compare Schafer and Schaffer 2.

nameMeanings.name: Hanss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Johannes .

variants.name: Hansel
meanings: Pet form of   Johannes .

en.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer was born in 1456, in Hesse-Darmstadt, Holy Roman Empire. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Hanss Shaffer. He died in 1531, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer est né en 1456, à Hessen-Darmstadt, Saint-Empire romain. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Hanss Shaffer. Il est décédé en 1531, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer wurde 1456 in Hessen-Darmstadt, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Hanss Shaffer mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1531 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer è nato il nel 1456 nel Hessen-Darmstadt, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Hanss Shaffer. Morì nel 1531, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Hessen-Darmstadt, Holy Roman Empire: ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチヘセン-ダルムスタト
ja.lifeSummary: Hanss Schafferは1456年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチヘセン-ダルムスタトで生まれた。彼はMrs. Hanss Shafferとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1531年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer(은)는 1456년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센-더스타드트에서 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Hanss Shaffer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1531년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer nasceu em 1456, em Hessen-Darmstadt, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Hanss Shaffer. Ele faleceu em 1531, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer родился в 1456 г. в местности хессен-дармстадт, хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Hanss Shaffer. Он умер в 1531 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hanss Schaffer nació en 1456, en Hessen-Darmstadt, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Hanss Shaffer. Murió en 1531, a la edad de 75 años.
